sys_hub_flow.description: When a Processing Job completes, creates a Reward Fulfilment record, notifies the consumer, and closes the Return Request.
sys_hub_flow.name: CircleBack - Reward Fulfilment Trigger

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Changed Fields
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_5c3de64915be4cadb5f791ee4d77f97e

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Record
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_5c3de64915be4cadb5f791ee4d77f97e

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Table Name
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_5c3de64915be4cadb5f791ee4d77f97e

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Get the Return Request linked to the Device Record
Check for existing Reward Fulfilment on this Return Request
Get the Device Record linked to this Processing Job
Update Return Request status to Complete

sys_hub_flow_logic_instance_v2.comment: Only create reward if none exists for this Return Request

sys_hub_flow_snapshot.description: When a Processing Job completes, creates a Reward Fulfilment record, notifies the consumer, and closes the Return Request.
sys_hub_flow_snapshot.name: CircleBack - Reward Fulfilment Trigger
